subject: XML content on create anchors node support
commit_message:
XML content on create anchors node support

Add XML content type support on anchor node creation.

Issue-ID: CPS-1257
Change-Id: I7e7a9a1961b6e81de93a4e32e842b47f8a163a09
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Signed-off-by: Lee Anjella Macabuhay <lee.anjella.macabuhay@est.tech>

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

(14 comments)

good work!
I have only one real concern re te PAI return type, maybe you didn't mean to change that.
New and modified test are very good, a little clean up required but that is to be expect as as I assume you haven't doen Groovy tets before. I need we can meet for 30 minute and i can help you with some of tests changes

Final as part of the commit you should update the doc: release notes and copy the combined new OPen API yaml (see instructions on step 2 here https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/CPS+Release+Process)
